title: helixyra cladostachya
side_effects: Helixyra cladostachya can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and swelling. Ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic properties. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also cause liver damage and affect kidney function. Furthermore, using the plant improperly can increase the risk of seizures, headaches, and respiratory problems in individuals with pre-existing medical conditions.
